# Block Quotes Demo

## Single-level block quote

> This is a simple block quote. It should render with a │  prefix and
> dimmed italic styling to visually separate it from regular text.

## Block quote with multiple paragraphs

> First paragraph inside the block quote.
>
> Second paragraph, separated by a blank line.

## Nested block quote (3 levels)

> Outer quote level 1.
>
> > Inner quote level 2.
> >
> > > Deeply nested quote level 3.

## Block quote containing a list

> Here is a list inside a quote:
>
> - First bullet item
> - Second bullet item
> - Third bullet item

## Block quote containing a code block

> Use the following command:
>
> ```bash
> cargo test -- -D warnings
> ```

## Block quote containing a heading

> ## Heading Inside Quote
>
> Paragraph after the heading, still inside the quote.

## Block quote with inline formatting

> This quote has **bold**, *italic*, `inline code`, and a [link](https://example.com).

## Block quotes before and after content

Regular paragraph before the quote.

> Quoted content here.

Regular paragraph after the quote.

---

## Deeply nested with mixed content

> Level 1 text.
>
> > Level 2 text.
> >
> > - Item in nested quote
> > - Another item
